name: eve-pay
description: Approval-gated Eve agent that buys sandbox API access with Pay.sh

scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run build

instructions: Add an AI Gateway credential for local development:
Set AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY in .env.local, then start the Eve agent:
Ask: Get a paid sandbox quote for AAPL
Review and approve the payment details when Eve pauses.
This starter uses sandbox funds only. Read README.md before adapting it for real payments.
